question: Modify the `Book` class (from Q1) to include a default constructor (initializes with empty strings), a parameterized constructor, and a copy constructor. Demonstrate creating objects using all three types of constructors.

test_cases.expected:
--- Demonstrating Constructors ---
Book 1 (Default): Title: , Author: 
Book 2 (Parameterized): Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams
Book 3 (Copy of Book 2): Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams
Book 3 (Modified): Title: A New Title, Author: A New Author
Book 2 (Original after Book 3 modified): Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams
